title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXLVIII. Charms.
content:
Three crooked cripples went through Cripplegate, and through
    Cripplegate went three crooked cripples.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXLVIII. Charms." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
